description: These sneakers from puma's Ducati series are unique and feature quality craftsmanship. The low-profile design coupled with a combination leather and synthetic uppers make these a very comfortable and durable pair. The Ducati branding and Jumping cat logo add an extra dimension of style. The cushiony-soft midsole makes these shoes lightweight, while the rubber outsole with the motorcycle inspired tread pattern gives excellent traction.Upper Synthetic upper for durability Lace up front for snug Fit Soft near the toe box for flexible movement of the toe counter Midsole Soft footbed for ergonomic fit Lightweight EVA midsole for superior shock absorption Outsole Vulcanized sole with tire profile Rubber sole for extended durability Ducati lettering and puma Cat logo
